title: Carry out birthing duties
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out birthing duties demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for birthing

pcs.text: Read animal records and confirm anticipated birthing date with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read animal records and confirm anticipated birthing date with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read animal records and confirm anticipated birthing date with supervisor.

pcs.text: Check and monitor condition and health status of pregnant animal prior to birthing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and monitor condition and health status of pregnant animal prior to birthing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and monitor condition and health status of pregnant animal prior to birthing.

pcs.text: Prepare and use equipment, resources and materials according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and use equipment, resources and materials according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and use equipment, resources and materials according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices.

pcs.text: Provide shelter access for birthing females to ensure animal welfare needs are met
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide shelter access for birthing females to ensure animal welfare needs are met?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide shelter access for birthing females to ensure animal welfare needs are met.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to task.

pcs.text: Check and report faulty or unsafe equipment, resources, materials or PPE to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and report faulty or unsafe equipment, resources, materials or PPE to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and report faulty or unsafe equipment, resources, materials or PPE to supervisor.

pcs.text: Check for presence of predators and implement control measures where necessary and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check for presence of predators and implement control measures where necessary and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check for presence of predators and implement control measures where necessary and report to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for birthing

elements.title: Assist at the birthing process

pcs.text: Monitor environment and animals to assess whether birth is progressing normally
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor environment and animals to assess whether birth is progressing normally?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor environment and animals to assess whether birth is progressing normally.

pcs.text: Handle animals calmly with minimal disruption to birthing process according to workplace animal welfare and hygiene practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle animals calmly with minimal disruption to birthing process according to workplace animal welfare and hygiene practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle animals calmly with minimal disruption to birthing process according to workplace animal welfare and hygiene practices.

pcs.text: Identify animals experiencing birthing difficulties and intervene as appropriate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify animals experiencing birthing difficulties and intervene as appropriate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify animals experiencing birthing difficulties and intervene as appropriate.

pcs.text: Seek supervisor or veterinary advice if birth complications cannot be resolved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek supervisor or veterinary advice if birth complications cannot be resolved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek supervisor or veterinary advice if birth complications cannot be resolved.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assist at the birthing process

elements.title: Provide post-birthing assistance

pcs.text: Check and clear newborns airways where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and clear newborns airways where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and clear newborns airways where required.

pcs.text: Clean mother and newborn where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean mother and newborn where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean mother and newborn where required.

pcs.text: Monitor post-birthing health, suckling and bonding of female and newborn
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor post-birthing health, suckling and bonding of female and newborn?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor post-birthing health, suckling and bonding of female and newborn.

pcs.text: Administer antibiotics or other medicine as directed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Administer antibiotics or other medicine as directed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Administer antibiotics or other medicine as directed.

pcs.text: Clean and maintain birthing environment, facilities and equipment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain birthing environment, facilities and equipment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain birthing environment, facilities and equipment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Complete birth records according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete birth records according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete birth records according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report malfunctions, faults, wear or damage of facilities, equipment and resources to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report malfunctions, faults, wear or damage of facilities, equipment and resources to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report malfunctions, faults, wear or damage of facilities, equipment and resources to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Provide post-birthing assistance

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
